name: education_communications_outage_forces_lumen_car_fair
premise: A cheating investigation used keystroke logs; honor council wants expulsion while disability services says the pattern could be assistive tech. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education communications outage forces lumen car fair has converged with local pressure in the Marlow Junction corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The organization’s past incidents make care feel morally loud today, while fairness is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Priya Petrov
agents.identity: I am Priya Petrov, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mateo Morales
agents.identity: I am Mateo Morales, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on fairness.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on fairness for immediate traction on care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Priya Petrov must choose under care versus fairness. What does Priya Petrov do?
